title: Lenor Crease Releaser Spray Removes Creases in Fabric. Spring Awakening Scent, Twin Pack, 2 x 500ml
features: Removes Creases in Fabric with ease (Easy to follow instructions on the bottle)
Deodorizes clothes leaving them smelling fresh.
Ingredients: Contains among other ingredients: <5% Non-ionic surfactants, Perfume & Preservative (Laurylamine Dipropylenediamine).

Safety warning: USE ONLY AS INTENDED. IF SPRAYED ON HARD SURFACES, IMMEDIATELY CLEAN SURFACE WITH SURFACE CLEANER. Keep out of reach of children. Read label before use. Avoid breathing spray Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations. Flame Resistant Finishes: never soak or wash above 50°C
description: Product description Lenor Spring Awakening Crease Release removes wrinkles without the hassle of ironing. It also eliminates odors, leaving your clothes with a fresh spring scent. Spring awakening fragrance. Perfect combination of Lenor fragrance that removes wrinkles without the hassle of ironing. Removes creases in fabrics while eliminating unwanted odors. Directions 1. Shake the bottle well before use. 2. Hold 15-20 cm away from fabric and spray evenly. 3. Allow to dry for a few minutes
